title: TANNING FACILITY REGULATION
doc_html:
CHAPTER 27.  TANNING FACILITY REGULATION

§2701.  Short title

 This Chapter may be cited as the "Tanning Facility Regulation Act".

Acts 1990, No. 587, §1, eff. July 19, 1990.
